channel.title: imdunndrawing TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from imdunndrawing

item.title: I had an amazing time at the Strawberry festival! A big thank you to everyone who stopped by and got a drawing. ##cute##caricature##strawberryfestival
item.description: I had an amazing time at the Strawberry festival! A big thank you to everyone who stopped by and got a drawing. ##cute##caricature##strawberryfestival
item.author: imdunndrawing

item.title: She said her hobby was baking… so I put her BUNS in the oven. 🍑🔥 She’d been following my work for a while and finally tracked me down at the fair for her first caricature. The whole time she had NO idea what I was drawing… and I definitely didn’t calm her
item.description: She said her hobby was baking… so I put her BUNS in the oven. 🍑🔥 She’d been following my work for a while and finally tracked me down at the fair for her first caricature. The whole time she had NO idea what I was drawing… and I definitely didn’t calm her
item.author: imdunndrawing

item.title: This is what I imagine being sucked into a Poké ball would look like 🤣. Happy #saintpatricksday #Caricature #pokemon #hearts
item.description: This is what I imagine being sucked into a Poké ball would look like 🤣. Happy #saintpatricksday #Caricature #pokemon #hearts
item.author: imdunndrawing

item.title: Had the pleasure drawing a fellow Airbrush Caricature Artist! Mila! Thanks for taking the time out of your day that’s it for me! #a#airbrushc#caricatureg#green
item.description: Had the pleasure drawing a fellow Airbrush Caricature Artist! Mila! Thanks for taking the time out of your day that’s it for me! #a#airbrushc#caricatureg#green
item.author: imdunndrawing

item.title: I’ve kind of watched these two grow up lol. And I’ve drawn them or their parents many times before. They’re always a blast!!! #rickandmorty #portals #pets #pugs
item.description: I’ve kind of watched these two grow up lol. And I’ve drawn them or their parents many times before. They’re always a blast!!! #rickandmorty #portals #pets #pugs
item.author: imdunndrawing

item.title: Beach date! #cute #caricatures #beach #surfing
item.description: Beach date! #cute #caricatures #beach #surfing
item.author: imdunndrawing

item.title: Today I present to you two of the illest and realest artists I’ve ever had the pleasure of meeting and working with! Individually, each of them has the power to bring any crew of ragtag outlaws to their knees… But together? They become the One Piece. @Mr.
item.description: Today I present to you two of the illest and realest artists I’ve ever had the pleasure of meeting and working with! Individually, each of them has the power to bring any crew of ragtag outlaws to their knees… But together? They become the One Piece. @Mr.
item.author: imdunndrawing

item.title: Here is hoping I didn’t bite off more than I can chew. Butt, I had an absolute blast drawing these guys. And in the spirit of the Fair, I thought why not candy apple lol #c#caricaturec#candyapples#sweetc#cute
item.description: Here is hoping I didn’t bite off more than I can chew. Butt, I had an absolute blast drawing these guys. And in the spirit of the Fair, I thought why not candy apple lol #c#caricaturec#candyapples#sweetc#cute
item.author: imdunndrawing

item.title: This job has given me the opportunity to see a lot of amazing relationships, Blossom. I’ve drawn them before, and now they’re sitting for me again after they got engaged. it’s a beautiful thing. ##caricature##sweet##bride##butterfly
item.description: This job has given me the opportunity to see a lot of amazing relationships, Blossom. I’ve drawn them before, and now they’re sitting for me again after they got engaged. it’s a beautiful thing. ##caricature##sweet##bride##butterfly
item.author: imdunndrawing

item.title: This is another caricature artist! Sam Gory! #sonic #sonicthehedgehog #gamergirl #sega #blue
item.description: This is another caricature artist! Sam Gory! #sonic #sonicthehedgehog #gamergirl #sega #blue
item.author: imdunndrawing

item.title: Cute kid! She turns 17 TODAY! April 7th. Happy Birthday again! And thanks for letting me draw you 🥹 #pokemon #birthdaygirl #cute #caricature
item.description: Cute kid! She turns 17 TODAY! April 7th. Happy Birthday again! And thanks for letting me draw you 🥹 #pokemon #birthdaygirl #cute #caricature
item.author: imdunndrawing

item.title: A present to you, the owners of the best Caricatures company in the world !!! @Nattie and Rob Hume! Riding special guest “Roy boy” #frenchie #wildwest #dogmom #quickdrawcaricatures
item.description: A present to you, the owners of the best Caricatures company in the world !!! @Nattie and Rob Hume! Riding special guest “Roy boy” #frenchie #wildwest #dogmom #quickdrawcaricatures
item.author: imdunndrawing

item.title: So what do you think #Slytherin is cooking up? #harrypottertiktok ##Gryffindor##magic##caricature
item.description: So what do you think #Slytherin is cooking up? #harrypottertiktok ##Gryffindor##magic##caricature
item.author: imdunndrawing

item.title: When I saw she had a cast on, I asked if she broke her arm, beating up the other kids, and she nodded yes lol. Presently, acute kid… Future champion. ##boxing##cute##adorable##caterpillar
item.description: When I saw she had a cast on, I asked if she broke her arm, beating up the other kids, and she nodded yes lol. Presently, acute kid… Future champion. ##boxing##cute##adorable##caterpillar
item.author: imdunndrawing

item.title: She sat for her first Caricatures. Thought I would start her off light. #m#makeupc#cuteg#glamourc#caricature
item.description: She sat for her first Caricatures. Thought I would start her off light. #m#makeupc#cuteg#glamourc#caricature
item.author: imdunndrawing

item.title: Ladies and gentlemen, it’s with great pleasure that I present to you Steven, aka the good looking cook of Brooklyn, aka the Saucier of Delight, aka Chef’s Kiss! Who also happens to be a fellow caricature artist! I hope you enjoy And thank Y O U for takin
item.description: Ladies and gentlemen, it’s with great pleasure that I present to you Steven, aka the good looking cook of Brooklyn, aka the Saucier of Delight, aka Chef’s Kiss! Who also happens to be a fellow caricature artist! I hope you enjoy And thank Y O U for takin
item.author: imdunndrawing

item.title: I call it… Fatassed and Furious 😏🎨 So I drew these two ladies, both of whom were nervous as hell and had absolutely no idea what they were in for. 😆 If you’ve been following for a while, I hope to post a drawing of YOU one day! And if you’re not following
item.description: I call it… Fatassed and Furious 😏🎨 So I drew these two ladies, both of whom were nervous as hell and had absolutely no idea what they were in for. 😆 If you’ve been following for a while, I hope to post a drawing of YOU one day! And if you’re not following
item.author: imdunndrawing

item.title: First time in the chair… and they walked away FLEXIN’ 🦾” Let’s kick the week off with a couple of first-timers! And judging by their reaction… I’d say it worked out perfectly. 😆 Side note: if I had gone with my second idea, this drawing would’ve been INSA
item.description: First time in the chair… and they walked away FLEXIN’ 🦾” Let’s kick the week off with a couple of first-timers! And judging by their reaction… I’d say it worked out perfectly. 😆 Side note: if I had gone with my second idea, this drawing would’ve been INSA
item.author: imdunndrawing

item.title: To be “Ferret’s” not her first time getting a crazy drawing from me. 😅 If you recognize her face, it wouldn’t surprise me. I’ve drawn her many times, and hopefully I’ll get to draw her many more. But for those who don’t know, this is the amazing @Oddtatto
item.description: To be “Ferret’s” not her first time getting a crazy drawing from me. 😅 If you recognize her face, it wouldn’t surprise me. I’ve drawn her many times, and hopefully I’ll get to draw her many more. But for those who don’t know, this is the amazing @Oddtatto
item.author: imdunndrawing

item.title: They thought it would be ugly… but the final reveal had them ready to book a vacation 😏 They had no idea what to expect! To make things even better, there was a kid behind me loudly predicting how “UGLY” the drawing was going to turn out 🤣 Side note If y
item.description: They thought it would be ugly… but the final reveal had them ready to book a vacation 😏 They had no idea what to expect! To make things even better, there was a kid behind me loudly predicting how “UGLY” the drawing was going to turn out 🤣 Side note If y
item.author: imdunndrawing

item.title: For context, she is 4’11”. So I thought it would be funny to put her on stilts #caricature #space #cute #mom
item.description: For context, she is 4’11”. So I thought it would be funny to put her on stilts #caricature #space #cute #mom
item.author: imdunndrawing

item.title: She wanted me to do a super funny one. Am I wrong for this? 🤣 #caricature #funny #fyp #cute
item.description: She wanted me to do a super funny one. Am I wrong for this? 🤣 #caricature #funny #fyp #cute
item.author: imdunndrawing

item.title: 🇯🇵 Japan is turning footsteps into electricity! Using piezoelectric tiles, every step you take generates a small amount of energy. Millions of steps together can power LED lights and displays in busy places like Shibuya Station. A brilliant way to create
item.description: 🇯🇵 Japan is turning footsteps into electricity! Using piezoelectric tiles, every step you take generates a small amount of energy. Millions of steps together can power LED lights and displays in busy places like Shibuya Station. A brilliant way to create
item.author: imdunndrawing

item.title: #maythe4thbewithyou I know I’m a day late but, I wanted to post this fun one. #starwars #may4th #caricature
item.description: #maythe4thbewithyou I know I’m a day late but, I wanted to post this fun one. #starwars #may4th #caricature
item.author: imdunndrawing

item.title: THE HUNTER BECAME THE HUNTED… AND NOW HE’S BACK FOR REVENGE 😤🏹 I’ve had the pleasure of drawing this AWESOME couple twice now, and honestly, getting repeat customers like this always means a lot to me. Last year, I drew them being hunted by me as the Pred
item.description: THE HUNTER BECAME THE HUNTED… AND NOW HE’S BACK FOR REVENGE 😤🏹 I’ve had the pleasure of drawing this AWESOME couple twice now, and honestly, getting repeat customers like this always means a lot to me. Last year, I drew them being hunted by me as the Pred
item.author: imdunndrawing

item.title: This one is incredibly special to me! I’ve drawn these two FOUR years in a row, and this year… they got engaged! Not only that, but they actually won a fair giveaway where the fair paid for their wedding! How insane is that?! 😭🎉 Naturally, I had to draw t
item.description: This one is incredibly special to me! I’ve drawn these two FOUR years in a row, and this year… they got engaged! Not only that, but they actually won a fair giveaway where the fair paid for their wedding! How insane is that?! 😭🎉 Naturally, I had to draw t
item.author: imdunndrawing

item.title: I love nerd culture !!! #link #Zelda #Fantasy #MiddleEarth #Gamer
item.description: I love nerd culture !!! #link #Zelda #Fantasy #MiddleEarth #Gamer
item.author: imdunndrawing

item.title: When your faceing a problem you can’t HANDLE Today I present to you the ever calm and collected Calista! A.k.a. The cropped hair face assassin, A.K.A but I see glare of judgment, who just happens to be an insanely talented caricature artist. #thumbsup
item.description: When your faceing a problem you can’t HANDLE Today I present to you the ever calm and collected Calista! A.k.a. The cropped hair face assassin, A.K.A but I see glare of judgment, who just happens to be an insanely talented caricature artist. #thumbsup
item.author: imdunndrawing

item.title: They went from, super nervous… Too excited! Would you want this kind of Caricature, or should I have gone more funny? #cute #unicorn #timelapse
item.description: They went from, super nervous… Too excited! Would you want this kind of Caricature, or should I have gone more funny? #cute #unicorn #timelapse
item.author: imdunndrawing

item.title: This is actually my FOURTH time drawing this couple! And every single year, I try to outdo the last drawing. Which, at this point, is becoming a dangerous game for my imagination lol. For a little context, the previous drawings leaned much more toward the
item.description: This is actually my FOURTH time drawing this couple! And every single year, I try to outdo the last drawing. Which, at this point, is becoming a dangerous game for my imagination lol. For a little context, the previous drawings leaned much more toward the
item.author: imdunndrawing

item.title: Lol they turned for me before I started. And well. #reveal #reactions #caricature #foryou #funny #funnydrawing #cartoon #artiktok #drawing
item.description: Lol they turned for me before I started. And well. #reveal #reactions #caricature #foryou #funny #funnydrawing #cartoon #artiktok #drawing
item.author: imdunndrawing

item.title: So this was the last drawing of the night. And they just so happen to make my night. Full of life, great movie recommendations, and the smell of cheese and pepperoni. I immediately liked them both. Theme: taking a while guess he worked at Domino’s, and sh
item.description: So this was the last drawing of the night. And they just so happen to make my night. Full of life, great movie recommendations, and the smell of cheese and pepperoni. I immediately liked them both. Theme: taking a while guess he worked at Domino’s, and sh
item.author: imdunndrawing

item.title: I absolutely LOVE her reaction!!! 😂😂😂 #cute #caricature #fyp #beachbody
item.description: I absolutely LOVE her reaction!!! 😂😂😂 #cute #caricature #fyp #beachbody
